items.title: Aliyah Boston’s masterful performance leads Fever to 34-point rout of Aces
items.body_excerpt: Aliyah Boston met the moment and had a special game in Las Vegas. LAS VEGAS — Aliyah Boston won the tip, opened the game with a floater, and delivered a masterful performance as the Indiana Fever captured a 109-75 wire-to-wire win, their second in eight days against the 2025…

items.title: Is the Bucks' crooked Gary Trent Jr. contract punishment enough?

items.title: Louis CK and the Millennial Disease of "This Used to Be Better"
items.body_excerpt: One niche downside of the post-literate society is the dearth of mainstream writing on offer to non-neurotic people. Certain art forms decline. When Louis CK comes out with his “Ridiculous” Netflix special, I know that pretty much any written review will be worthless. The only…

items.title: Basketball Intelligence For 7/13/26
items.body_excerpt: NOTE: As always, our Summer League expedition played havoc with our usual daily production schedule. As a result, today’s BI is stuffed with 2 1/2 days of stories.
